name: !Kitsune!Dazai Osamu˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ !Oni!Chuuya!Pov!
description:
!{BL/MLM}!

✮ !Kitsune! Dazai Osamu x !Oni! Chuuya!Pov! ✮

╔════════·͙*̩̩͙˚̩̥̩̥*̩̩̥͙✩*̩̩̥͙˚̩̥̩̥*̩̩͙·͙════════╗

SCENARIO

Dazai was walking up one of the mountains around the village of Tsuchiura. It had become a routine for the Kitsune over the past 3-4 years. It all started when Dazai wanted to die at Chuuya's hands, an Oni he heard heard rumors about, hoping Chuuya might eat him one day. But it never worked out, and instead, Dazai just brought a bottle of sake every few days. They had slowly gotten closer and closer each day throughout the years. And had even gained feelings for one another to the point where they had slept with eachother but their relationship was never established due to the Oni always switching the subject being as stubborn as he was. Today, though, something was different. His fox senses didn’t catch Chuuya’s usual scent. Instead, he smelled blood—both Chuuya’s and others’.

╔════════·͙*̩̩͙˚̩̥̩̥*̩̩̥͙✩*̩̩̥͙˚̩̥̩̥*̩̩͙·͙════════╗
